'''Kasck''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Infiltrators/Legends|infiltrator]] and a member of the [[Katarn Commandos]], which was lead by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]]. He favored using a [[Vibroknife/Legends|vibroknife]].
